meta.title: Sinora - Travel to China, made simple
meta.description: The platform that prepares, organises and supports your trip to China: tailored itineraries, paperwork, trains, interactive maps and local tips.

hero.badge: Before, during and after the trip
hero.title: Your trip to China,
hero.subtitle: Tailored itineraries, paperwork made clear, the rail network at your fingertips. Everything you need to leave with peace of mind.

how.title: A companion for every stage
how.subtitle: From the first idea to coming home, Sinora stays by your side.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.text: Visa, eSIM, essential apps, mobile payments: paperwork becomes a clear checklist.

steps.title: Travel
steps.text: Itineraries, trains, interactive maps and local tips available offline, wherever you are.

steps.title: Keep
steps.text: Your trips, favourites and notes gathered in a personal space, ready for next time.

features.title: Everything in one place
features.subtitle: The essential tools for a successful trip to China.

items.title: Trip generator
items.text: A full itinerary built from your budget, your wishes and your pace.

items.title: Pre-departure prep
items.text: Visa, customs, health, internet: every formality explained simply.

items.title: Rail network
items.text: High-speed trains, classes, stations and connections, all decoded.

items.text: Weather, safety, transport and culture, visualised city by city.

items.title: Halal travel
items.text: Restaurants, mosques and adapted itineraries, with total peace of mind.

identity.title: City identity

meta.title: Plan your route - Sinora
meta.description: Interactive China map: click cities to build your route, see estimated distance, duration and transport budget.

routePlanner.title: Plan your route
routePlanner.subtitle: Click cities to add them, reorder at your own pace.
routePlanner.empty: Select at least two cities to see your route appear.

dates.title: Trip dates
dates.subtitle: Set your dates so suggestions match the real duration.

locale.fr: Format AAAA-MM-JJ. Les jours sont comptés inclusifs.

density.title: Trip density
density.subtitle: Score based on your cities, transit and available days.

cut.title: Drop one stop
cut.body: {city} stretches the trip significantly. Without it the pace eases.

trim.title: Trim each city
trim.body: Shave a day off the densest city to give yourself breathing room.

explore.title: Add a nearby excursion
explore.body: {city} would add a short stop without bending your route.

extend.title: Stretch your stays
extend.body: Use the free time to extend a favourite city.

mapHint.title: Click a city
mapHint.subtitle: Build your route directly from the map.

gestures.mobile: Use two fingers to move the map

routePlanner.indirectHint: Some legs use an indirect route computed by the engine.
routePlanner.missingHint: One or more legs have no direct connection and no path could be found.

booking.title: Where to book
booking.subtitle: Platforms relevant to the transport modes of your itinerary.

templates.title: Ready-to-load itineraries
templates.subtitle: Six credible templates - one click to load, then personalise.

context.title: Travel context
context.subtitle: Best season and upcoming peak periods to watch.
context.noPeak: No major peak in the next 90 days.

match.common: Ideal window across all your cities.
match.majority: Favourable for most of your stops.
match.any: Open period, check each city individually.

score.title: Route score
score.subtitle: Geographic coherence, comfort and balance.
score.allGood: Route looks well-balanced, nothing to flag.

backtrack.title: Backtrack detected
backtrack.body: You go back on yourself between {cities}. Reordering can save time.

long-leg.title: Very long leg
long-leg.body: {cities}: {value} km in one go. Consider an intermediate stop.

fragmented.title: Fragmented route
fragmented.body: Many legs without a direct connection ({value}). Tightening up would help.

suggestions.intense: Consider adding a calm stop to catch your breath.
suggestions.exhausting: Very dense itinerary - keep at least one restful night.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Tune your trip - every choice shapes the suggestions.

style.title: Travel style
style.subtitle: Pick the tone - budget and suggestions follow.

suggestions.title: Stop suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Cities worth inserting into your route.
suggestions.empty: Select a city to see suggestions.
